title: Tea Aroma
description: A tea-themed Minecraft mod featuring tea trees, tea utensils, and various teas.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ff5645f2e901a245db2c3bd07537b5d47d1726b.png)
# 🌿 Tea Aroma
## 🌱 Mod Content
🍃 **Generation**
- Tea trees can be found in jungle biome and its variants. Harvested fresh tea leaves can be processed into various beverages.

🍵 **Tea Utensils**
- Adds Tea Kettle, Cup and Bamboo Tray for immersive interactive experiences.

✨ **Tea Effects**
- Brewed teas provide different effects. Players can add sugar or honey for more effects.

## ⚙️ Compatibility
- Compatible with [Simply Tea!](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-tea) :
  - Use Tea Kettle of Tea Aroma to brew Simply Tea! beverages.
  - Use Teapots of Simply Tea! to brew drinks of Tea Aroma.

## 📦 Beta Version
This mod is currently in Beta, so issues and instabilities may occur. If you'd like to play, keep in mind:
  - Backup your saves often.
  - Make sure everything is working before adding it to a modpack.

## 🌿 Did You Know?
[Tea Kettle](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tea-kettle) is the core inspiration for this mod.
